should_trigger: Create a reusable Agent Skill from this repeated successful workflow
Draft a Pi skill from these notes but do not enable it yet
Turn this PATCH.md workflow into a portable skill skeleton with tests
should_not_trigger: Audit all installed skills for duplicates and missing tests
Create a refinement plan for a skill that failed a user correction
Search per-skill memory for repo-explorer observations

ambiguous.prompt: A skill failed; make a reusable improvement from that experience
ambiguous.decision: Use skill-refinement-loop when improving an existing skill from failure feedback; use skill-creator when drafting a new skill from a reusable successful trajectory.
ambiguous.reason: Creation and refinement are adjacent lifecycle steps but produce different artifacts.

notes: New disabled skill drafts from reusable workflows should route here.
